emails.subject: Re: Pinnacle West
emails.body: Re: Pinnacle West You're right I've changed the deal to APS and e-mailed the Real Time group to let them know of this situation they were unaware of the difference. Thanks, kate Rhonda L Denton 01/26/2001 11:19 AM
